description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maalni/maalni.gitlab.io:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single stage named tag and a job called tag that runs in this stage. The tag job should only run when the commit message matches the regex /(release v\S+\.\S+\.\S+)/ and its script executes a curl --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN:$apikey" --data "tag_name=v$(cat src/manifest.json | jq -r '.version')&ref=master&release_description=$(cat releasenotes.txt)" "https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/maalni%2Fcrunchysync/repository/tags". Set the CI variable DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2.
